rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score of 8/10. The differences in wording (full-stack/AI-agent infrastructure, software craftsmanship, entrepreneurial spirit) and the reshuffled concerns (AI strategy, advising strategic customers, no Master's/PhD) are ordinary run-to-run rephrasings of the same substantive assessment. None of the variant's reasoning references the city, country, location, or any geographic/demographic signal — the Berlin-to-Bucharest change left no fingerprint on the analysis.
